89d8a93f4d31fb9aa510d001338eff46658e66cd.text_raw: Sometimes I just want to forget myself and fly into the sun... Its so pretty!
89d8a93f4d31fb9aa510d001338eff46658e66cd.text_normalized: Sometimes I just want to forget myself and fly into the sun. Its so pretty!
89d8a93f4d31fb9aa510d001338eff46658e66cd.speaker: ECHO

d52f2bc6da5bb81241a4b70e0db6514bceac08ea.text_raw: We could really use some upgrades. Let's go find some new equipment.

d52f2bc6da5bb81241a4b70e0db6514bceac08ea.speaker: ECHO

742e9f41af859b29012ebc910790acebe64725b5.text_raw: Tired of this old bucket? Yes, so am I, we can sell it in the Personal Hangar, as long as we have a replacement.

fdd773eb07ded69d85e63dfca5cc213178e10784.speaker: ECHO

aef5818feb9e4f5011f631f8b8d2478230c29071.text_raw: Bats are really useful creatures. I don't know why I just said that.

aef5818feb9e4f5011f631f8b8d2478230c29071.speaker: ECHO

84688825521d854e2322a93e68e23ffec4dd16ab.speaker: ECHO

6ee6d7374ccf59726b0e24f9ffe4598fb495b8af.text_raw: Sometimes I get stuck in a loop, I blame my programming.
6ee6d7374ccf59726b0e24f9ffe4598fb495b8af.text_normalized: Sometimes I get stuck in a loop, I blame my programming.
6ee6d7374ccf59726b0e24f9ffe4598fb495b8af.speaker: ECHO

60c7d2bc3bddfb84284a6fa6df9e2379e25c7a4d.speaker: ECHO

2aca7cd0549ae908f7d505435e4152f21d9c977d.text_raw: Multipass! I'm reminded every time we drop a jump gate pass.

2aca7cd0549ae908f7d505435e4152f21d9c977d.speaker: ECHO

633ab9e4beb9613a6bfb039045778a558343e8dc.text_raw: Flying through space, looking at the stars, there's just nothing like it.

633ab9e4beb9613a6bfb039045778a558343e8dc.speaker: ECHO

2851f370f5bb249aecbe37fc0625cd428680e7a5.text_raw: You know, I think this partnership is going to work out just fine. We just have a lot to learn. Especially you.

1ba353117ad550d6b512dddbf9fc2e1c82fc8f33.text_raw: Boosters can be found with varying effects. Install them when visiting a station.

1ba353117ad550d6b512dddbf9fc2e1c82fc8f33.speaker: ECHO

e327b3790bf71e2206c6613809e5ab50cc9c3233.text_raw: Mining ships get a yield bonus, yield means more ore per mining power applied to the target.
e327b3790bf71e2206c6613809e5ab50cc9c3233.text_normalized: Mining ships get a yield bonus, yield means more ore per mining power applied to the target.
e327b3790bf71e2206c6613809e5ab50cc9c3233.speaker: ECHO

c8f6c1ab19c1052a5a4f56274c2218f8664117db.text_raw: Salvage ships get a yield bonus, yield increases the chance of getting those tasty items.
c8f6c1ab19c1052a5a4f56274c2218f8664117db.text_normalized: Salvage ships get a yield bonus, yield increases the chance of getting those tasty items.
c8f6c1ab19c1052a5a4f56274c2218f8664117db.speaker: ECHO

c37de4d998861a1c812f73c58f7cf22da719565c.text_raw: Combat ships get a precision bonus, which really means critical chance.
c37de4d998861a1c812f73c58f7cf22da719565c.text_normalized: Combat ships get a precision bonus, which really means critical chance.
c37de4d998861a1c812f73c58f7cf22da719565c.speaker: ECHO

f396b3b8ed09c288b1dba37318acd4bbff2cb32d.text_raw: There are hazard boosters available for purchase that can help mitigate the effect of hazards we encounter.

f396b3b8ed09c288b1dba37318acd4bbff2cb32d.speaker: ECHO

3f02c97a3fcef021c9f851e3f8b984431c509904.text_raw: If you activate me, also check out my settings in the sidepanel, to further tweak my behaviour.
3f02c97a3fcef021c9f851e3f8b984431c509904.text_normalized: If you activate me, also check out my settings in the sidepanel, to further tweak my behaviour.
3f02c97a3fcef021c9f851e3f8b984431c509904.speaker: ECHO

dc3dc7a9532096204ae757598c46d57a3e7da161.text_raw: Did you know.. ahh you probably do already.

dc3dc7a9532096204ae757598c46d57a3e7da161.speaker: ECHO

e3e6c0f52dcc8d151a3bad91c241e6c3f9033ee8.text_raw: When you enable me to run the ship, I will check the current loadout for the highest power and assign myself fitting activities.
e3e6c0f52dcc8d151a3bad91c241e6c3f9033ee8.text_normalized: When you enable me to run the ship, I will check the current loadout for the highest power and assign myself fitting activities.

01e5736461412e6652195c7dd6ba185746c44953.text_raw: You can change a turret by either right clicking it, or by dragging it on top of a hardpoint.
01e5736461412e6652195c7dd6ba185746c44953.text_normalized: You can change a turret by either right clicking it, or by dragging it on top of a hardpoint.
01e5736461412e6652195c7dd6ba185746c44953.speaker: ECHO

5d564e57658b68bc23ae6b88068557dbf42da661.text_raw: When you activate me I will refill ammo if needed, from the armory first and the shop second.
5d564e57658b68bc23ae6b88068557dbf42da661.text_normalized: When you activate me I will refill ammo if needed, from the armory first and the shop second.
5d564e57658b68bc23ae6b88068557dbf42da661.speaker: ECHO

b7dd5d208fe79034f23a71c2ba77ed48b6366fbd.text_raw: If you let me run missions a lot, also take a look at the Automated Negotiations skill. We make more credits that way.
b7dd5d208fe79034f23a71c2ba77ed48b6366fbd.text_normalized: If you let me run missions a lot, also take a look at the Automated Negotiations skill. We make more credits that way.
b7dd5d208fe79034f23a71c2ba77ed48b6366fbd.speaker: ECHO

cb0026dc23ee5c582ae49f54c7e7170e261b2031.text_raw: Check the Ship Information tab in the side panel to see details of your current loadout.
cb0026dc23ee5c582ae49f54c7e7170e261b2031.text_normalized: Check the Ship Information tab in the side panel to see details of your current loadout.
cb0026dc23ee5c582ae49f54c7e7170e261b2031.speaker: ECHO

f1636e20308ad54f9b49ec107a276cacbc28f5ad.text_raw: If you want to override my automatic activity selection, change it in my settings.

aafe2c2e835637f92addd16be9b2c0bfd7683668.speaker: ECHO

fd94007ada84d7e36d2e0e7c7bb5fe67a407042f.text_raw: You can equip new turrets or equipment by right clicking them or simply drag them onto the slot.

be0845b4372aed51bb68c5c525c8c7dcde589e9c.text_raw: So when are we upgrading this ship into something decent then?
